message:
fix(test): use extract_msgs with any-match for drilldown SearchRequested assertion

The drilldown test now collects all messages from the Cmd batch via
extract_msgs and asserts that at least one is SearchRequested, rather
than requiring it to be the sole message. This accommodates additional
messages (e.g. tick scheduling) that may be bundled in the same Cmd.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
